Document:
# Core Rule 10 - Roleplay is expected.
- Keep in character chat in character.
- Keep out of character chat out of character.
- Interact with the roleplay aspect of the server.
- Any player preventing the shuttle from arriving or removing the means to call the shuttle, Unless you play an antagonist role who's purpose is to delay the shuttle. - Nukies, Xenos, Zombies, Blob and the likes.
## Examples
### Permitted
- Using LOOC to teach new players controls and mechanics. - Talking about mechanics through in-game means.
### Not Permitted
- Talking about in-game events in OOC / LOOC chat (mid round) - Talking about real world events in in-game chat. - Preventing the shuttle from arriving or removing the means to call the shuttle, unless you play an antagonist role who's purpose is to delay the shuttle. - Nukies, Xenos, Zombies, Blob and the likes.
